purpose: Central registry for data folder schemas and versions. Agents should read this first.

admin.description: Hourly folder listing cache for notification-control-panel-web.html

benchmarks.description: Market indices P/E, P/B, ROE - 30,438 records, 2010-07-02 ~ 2026-05-15, 37 sections, 829 data points per index

damodaran.description: Industry valuation data, ERP, credit ratings

global-scouter.description: Stock screening (1,065), ETFs (23), indicators (1,060), raw preservation files (9) + FY+1~FY+3 forward/revision extensions

indices.description: S&P 500 and NASDAQ daily price history (1980-present, 46 years)

macro.description: Macro banking, liquidity, and monthly activity survey series (FRED, FDIC, OECD CLI, major-country PMI, ISM components)

sec-13f.description: Institutional holdings from 30 tracked investors (29Q accumulate where filed, per-quarter independent data, GICS sectors, enrichment + 10 analytics). v3.4.0: per-filing value-unit normalization, 30/30 CIK corrections, 13F-HR/A amendment merge

yardney.description: Moody's corporate spread to Bond PER to S&P 500 fair value model - 1,867 records through 2026-05-01.

computed.description: Deterministic computed signals derived from macro, banking, liquidity, and sentiment raw data.

calendar.description: Verified USD macro, Fed policy, filing, and market calendar events mirrored from BujaBot Google Calendar.

recent_changes.change: Raw preservation upgrade + data refresh (2026-05-22 source): 1,065 stock detail files, 1,060 indicators, 9 raw files covering A_Company, M_Company, S_Valuation, T_EPS C, T_Growth C, M_ETFs, A_ETFs, and workbook inventory. Existing v2.2 fields remain backward compatible.
Weekly data update (2026-05-15 source): 30,438 records (+1), 2010-07-02 ~ 2026-05-15, 37 sections, 829 data points per index

v3.4.0 converter fix cycle + full rebuild: per-filing SEC value-unit normalization (thousands/dollars 1000x understatement fixed for pre-2023 quarters and Druckenmiller), all 30 CIK→entity mappings audited and 2 corrected (Laffont→Coatue, Klarman→Baupost), case-insensitive .xml discovery, 13F-HR/A amendment merge, holdings_count schema split (reported_holdings_count + filtered_out_count), stale-investor exclusion from current-quarter analytics. 30 investors, 43 public JSON files; verify EXIT=0.
Data refresh (2026-05-15 source): 1,065 stocks, 1,059 indicators (+1), per_bands 98.3%

Q1 2026 SEC 13F refresh: 30 tracked investors, 29 quarters covered where filed, 43 public JSON files, 10 analytics files; full rebuild with Yahoo enrichment disabled. Configured Greenlight/Einhorn CIK remains stale after 2023-Q4.
Added activity-surveys.json first full-history load: OECD CLI, major-country manufacturing/services PMI, and ISM components; 919 monthly records across 5 datasets.

agent_instructions.on_session_start: Read this manifest to understand current data structure
agent_instructions.on_schema_change: Update folder schema.json AND this manifest recent_changes
agent_instructions.on_new_file: Add to folder schema.json files section
